page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg8i.large is a general-purpose virtual machine instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It is built on the x86_64 architecture and features an Intel Xeon 6462C processor with a clock speed of 3.3 GHz. The instance provides 2 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 2 physical cores with 1.0 thread per core, ensuring dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading.

The instance is configured with 8.0 GB of system memory, which equates to 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPU accelerators, meaning all storage requirements must be fulfilled via network-attached volumes. The baseline network bandwidth is specified at 2 Gbps.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation and high clock speed provide predictable compute performance for workloads that do not require massive memory footprints or local storage. This hardware profile is suited for general-purpose applications, lightweight web serving, microservices, and small database deployments.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg8i.large is an x86_64 general-purpose instance featuring an Intel Xeon 6462C processor running at 3.3 GHz. It provides 2 dedicated vCPUs across 2 physical cores with a single thread per core, ensuring consistent compute performance without hyperthreading. The instance is configured with 8.0 GB of memory, yielding 4.0 GB per core, and has a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, requiring external network storage. This hardware profile delivers a balanced resource allocation, making it qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads requiring dedicated CPU execution. The ecs.hfg8i.large is suited for general-purpose applications, lightweight web servers, microservices, and small database deployments.
